task_completion.description: Create four new collections: Geometry, Lighting, Cameras, and Helpers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender Outliner panel (usually top right), four new collections named exactly 'Geometry', 'Lighting', 'Cameras', and 'Helpers' should be visible.

task_completion.description: Move all 7 mesh objects into the Geometry collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Outliner, the 'Geometry' collection should contain the 7 mesh objects: BaseCube, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone, Torus, Suzanne, and GroundPlane.

task_completion.description: Move all lights into the Lighting collection and all cameras into the Cameras collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Outliner, the 'Lighting' collection should contain SunLight, PointLight, and SpotLight. The 'Cameras' collection should contain MainCamera and OverheadCamera.

task_completion.description: Move all empty objects into the Helpers collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Outliner, the 'Helpers' collection should contain PivotEmpty and TargetEmpty.

task_completion.description: Disable viewport visibility for the Helpers collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Outliner, the eye icon (or monitor icon) next to the 'Helpers' collection should be toggled off (appearing closed, slashed, or grayed out).

task_completion.description: Save the scene to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar should display the file path ending in 'organized_scene.blend', or a save dialog/notification should confirm the file was saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/organized_scene.blend'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender GUI to organize the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Blender Outliner and menus, rather than executing a Python script in a terminal to bypass manual organization.

integrity.description: No objects were deleted from the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Outliner should still display all 14 original objects across the new collections. The total count of objects must remain 14.
The objects in the Outliner must retain their exact original names (e.g., BaseCube, SunLight, MainCamera, PivotEmpty).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scene contains exactly 14 objects: 7 meshes (BaseCube, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone, Torus, Suzanne, GroundPlane), 3 lights (SunLight, PointLight, SpotLight), 2 cameras (MainCamera, OverheadCamera), and 2 empties (PivotEmpty, TargetEmpty). The agent must create 4 collections: 'Geometry', 'Lighting', 'Cameras', and 'Helpers', and move the respective objects into them. The 'Helpers' collection must have its viewport visibility disabled (eye icon closed). The final scene must be saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/organized_scene.blend' without deleting or renaming any objects.
